faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in North Bellmore?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment services in North Bellmore typically range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most homeowners notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target fleas in all life stages (eggs, larvae, pupae, and adults). Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Our technicians will provide specific instructions based on the products used in your North Bellmore home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation improves treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming thoroughly, washing pet bedding, removing pet toys and food bowls, and ensuring pets receive flea treatment from your veterinarian. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when scheduling your North Bellmore flea treatment service.
